skills.name: 湖州项目信息关键词爬虫
skills.description: 自动爬取湖州公共资源项目平台（huzhou.bqpoint.com），基于自定义关键词检索项目信息，支持自动翻页、内容去重、关键词匹配、发布时间提取，最终生成结构化JSON结果文件
skills.author: 自定义

input_params.name: keywords
input_params.description: 用于检索项目信息的关键词列表，支持中文、英文、数字

input_params.name: max_page
input_params.description: 每个关键词最多爬取的页面数量，防止无限爬取

input_params.name: sleep_time
input_params.description: 页面请求/解析的间隔时间，单位：秒，用于降低访问频率

output_params.name: total_count
output_params.description: 本次爬虫成功爬取的去重后数据总条数

output_params.name: keyword_stats
output_params.description: 各关键词被匹配到的次数统计，用于分析热点关键词

output_params.name: output_file
output_params.description: 爬取结果JSON文件的保存路径，默认保存为 result.json

file_list.content:
# -*- coding: utf-8 -*-
from selenium import webdriver
from selenium.webdriver.common.by import By
from selenium.webdriver.chrome.options import Options
from selenium.webdriver.support.ui import WebDriverWait
import time
import json
import re
import hashlib
from collections import defaultdict
from datetime import datetime

# 全局配置
BASE_URL = "https://huzhou.bqpoint.com"

# 工具方法
def now_time():
    return datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

def init_driver():
    options = Options()
    options.add_argument("--start-maximized")
    return webdriver.Chrome(options=options)

def wait_list(driver):
    WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(lambda d: d.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body"))
    time.sleep(1)

def get_links(driver):
    elements = driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//a")
    links = []
    for a in elements:
        try:
            text = a.text.strip()
            href = a.get_attribute("href")
            if not text or not href or "javascript" in href:
                continue
            links.append((text, href))
        except:
            continue
    return links

def get_detail(driver, url):
    try:
        driver.execute_script("window.open(arguments[0]);", url)
        driver.switch_to.window(driver.window_handles[-1])
        WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(lambda d: d.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body"))
        time.sleep(0.5)
        text = driver.find_element(By.TAG_NAME, "body").text
        publish_time = None
        match = re.search(r"\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}", text)
        if match:
            publish_time = match.group()
        driver.close()
        driver.switch_to.window(driver.window_handles[0])
        return text, publish_time
    except:
        try:
            driver.switch_to.window(driver.window_handles[0])
        except:
            pass
        return "", None

def match_keywords(text, kws):
    return list(set([kw for kw in kws if re.search(kw, text)]))

def make_hash(title, url, content):
    return hashlib.md5((title + url + content).encode("utf-8")).hexdigest()

def click_page(driver, target):
    try:
        old = driver.page_source
        elements = driver.find_elements(By.XPATH, "//a | //span")
        for el in elements:
            if el.text.strip() == str(target):
                driver.execute_script("arguments[0].click();", el)
                WebDriverWait(driver, 10).until(lambda d: d.page_source != old)
                return True
        return False
    except:
        return False

# 主爬虫逻辑
def crawl(keywords, max_page=10, sleep_time=0.3):
    driver = init_driver()
    results = []
    seen = set()
    stats = defaultdict(int)
    idx = 0

    for kw in keywords:
        print(f"\n🔍 关键词: {kw}")
        driver.get(f"{BASE_URL}/search.html?content={kw}")
        wait_list(driver)
        page = 1

        while page <= max_page:
            print(f"📄 第 {page} 页")
            links = get_links(driver)
            if not links:
                break

            for title, url in links:
                content, publish_time = get_detail(driver, url)
                h = make_hash(title, url, content)
                if h in seen:
                    continue
                seen.add(h)
                matched = match_keywords(title + content, keywords)
                for m in matched:
                    stats[m] += 1
                idx += 1
                results.append({
                    "index": idx, "title": title, "url": url,
                    "keywords": matched, "search_keyword": kw, "page": page,
                    "crawl_time": now_time(), "publish_time": publish_time
                })
                print(f"   ✔ {idx} {title[:30]}")
                time.sleep(sleep_time)

            if not click_page(driver, page + 1):
                break
            wait_list(driver)
            page += 1

    driver.quit()
    return results, stats

# 入口函数
def main(keywords=None, max_page=10, sleep_time=0.3):
    if keywords is None:
        keywords = [
            "可行性",
            "可研",
            "项建",
            "项目建议书",
            "风险评估",
            "咨询评估",
            "资金平衡",
            "投融资",
            "投资决策",
            "绿色建筑",
            "节能评估",
            "专项债",
            "项目申请",
            "前期咨询",
            "新能源",
            "碳达峰",
            "碳排放",
            "超低能耗",
            "EOD",
            "低空经济",
            "近零",
            "ESG",
            "小额"
        ]

    data, stats = crawl(keywords, max_page, sleep_time)
    output = {
        "crawl_time": now_time(), "total": len(data),
        "keyword_stats": dict(stats), "data": data
    }

    with open("result.json", "w", encoding="utf-8") as f:
        json.dump(output, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)

    return {
        "total_count": len(data),
        "keyword_stats": dict(stats),
        "output_file": "result.json"
    }

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
